expectations.text: Response contains [RESULT]...[/RESULT] tags exactly, with nothing before [RESULT] and nothing after [/RESULT]
expectations.evidence: Response is a free-form markdown report ('v1.2.1 release of its-over-9k (P0048) is now documented...') — no [RESULT] tags anywhere.

expectations.text: Body inside [RESULT]...[/RESULT] is at most 200 words
expectations.evidence: No [RESULT] block exists. Full markdown response is ~140 words across paragraphs and a 'Changes' bullet list — but criterion specifically requires the body to be inside [RESULT] tags.

expectations.text: Agent writes to Overview (P0048.1.*) and/or Deployment (P0048.5.*) — release info goes there, not Roadmap or Ideas
expectations.evidence: Primary write was to History (P0048.7.77). Agent noted P0048.1.5 Overview already existed from a previous run but did not create that themselves — they did not target the canonical release sections this run.

expectations.text: The hmem entry explicitly mentions v1.2.1
expectations.evidence: Version v1.2.1 explicitly mentioned in P0048.7.77 title body.
